Contract.title: Contract
Contract.description: Represents a custom telecom contract with dynamic PVF quantities and state information.

contrato.description: The name or number of the contract

secretaria.description: The associated department or department name

quantities.description: Map of PVF key to its point count

status.description: State status representing Ativo / Suspenso / Encerrado

dataAssinatura.description: The date when the contract was signed

observacoes.description: Optional notes or comments about the contract

PvfPrices.title: PvfPrices
PvfPrices.description: Individual premium and standard PVF unit multi-rate chart values.

MonthlyBillingSnapshot.title: Monthly Billing Snapshot
MonthlyBillingSnapshot.description: A snapshot of the monthly billing, including contract details, prices, totals, and metadata about who saved it and when.

savedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the snapshot was saved

savedBy.description: Full name of the user who performed the save

totalPvfCount.description: Total sum of PVF points across all contracts at the moment of saving

totalBilling.description: Total estimated billing across all contracts at the moment of saving

contracts.description: A list of contracts snapshots included in this billing

prices.description: Snapshot of the individual PVF unit prices used for this calculation

UmTelecomRecord.title: UmTelecomRecord
UmTelecomRecord.description: Represents an individual task, O.S. or event logged under the Um Telecom billing module.

PvfMonthlyContract.title: PvfMonthlyContract
PvfMonthlyContract.description: Represents a custom telecom contract with dynamic PVF quantities specifically associated with a reference month state.

StarlinkRecord.title: StarlinkRecord
StarlinkRecord.description: Represents an individual Starlink task, O.S. or event logged under the Starlink module.

VectraRecord.title: VectraRecord
VectraRecord.description: Represents an individual Vectra task, O.S. or event logged under the Vectra module.

ContactCenterRecord.title: ContactCenterRecord
ContactCenterRecord.description: Represents an individual contract/item in the Contact Center billing module.

ContactCenterPrices.title: ContactCenterPrices
ContactCenterPrices.description: Pricing configuration values for Contact Center billing.

/contracts/{contractId}.description: Collection of telecom contracts registered by system admins and managers.

/systemPrices/{docId}.description: Collection housing system-wide active currency prices (systemPrices/current for PVF and systemPrices/contactCenter for Contact Center).

/monthlyBillingSnapshots/{snapshotId}.description: Collection of saved billing snapshots for reference months

/umTelecomRecords/{recordId}.description: Collection storing electrical O.Ss, PCM maintenance, and activation events for Um Telecom module.

/pvfMonthlyContracts/{contractId}.description: Collection storing customized month-by-month contract quantities and states.

/starlinkRecords/{recordId}.description: Collection storing Starlink O.Ss, maintenance, and solutions for Starlink module.

/vectraRecords/{recordId}.description: Collection storing Vectra O.Ss, Wifi, and UTM events for Vectra Module.

/contactCenterRecords/{recordId}.description: Collection storing Contact Center virtual/on-premise queue systems, SMS queues, recording nodes, and contract setups.
